attribute_type.description:
Type of attribute: "span" for built-in span fields (e.g. name), "span_attribute" for span-level attributes, "span_resource_attribute" for resource-level attributes.

* `span` - span
* `span_attribute` - span_attribute
* `span_resource_attribute` - span_resource_attribute

key.description: The attribute key to get values for.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.
